# Skills

```{=html}
<table>
    <thead>
        <tr>
            <th colspan="3"> <b> Whitworth University, B.S. Computer Science and B.S. Mathematics: G.P.A 3.93/4.0 </b> </th>
        </tr>
    </thead>
    <tbody>
      <tr>
        <td> Outstanding Math Major '20 </td>
        <td> ICPC PNW Site Winner '18 </td>
        <td> Howard R. Gage Scholarship '17, '18, '19 </td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td> Sports Events Coordinator '19-'20 </td>
        <td> Men's Basketball Team '16-'18 </td>
        <td> Calculus Grader, Math Tutor '17-'18 </td>
      </tr>
      <tr>
        <td> Chess Club President '19-'20 </td>
        <td> Pine Codes Winner '19 </td>
        <td> Spokanimal Volunteer '19 </td>
      </tr>
    </tbody>
</table>
```

::: {.content-visible when-profile="cpp"}

```
<table>
    <thead>
        <tr>
            <th font-weight="bold">C / C++17</th>
            <th font-weight="bold">DevOps</th>
            <th font-weight="bold">Python</th>
            <th font-weight="bold">Machine Learning</th>
            <th font-weight="bold">Other</th>
        </tr>
    </thead>
    <tbody>
        <tr>
            <td>
                <p> CUDA, HIP,
                <p> CPU/GPU Profiling,
                <p> MPI, OpenMP,
                <p> CMake, Spack
            </td>
            <td>
                <p> GitHub/GitLab, vim/tmux,
                <p> SLURM/LSF, HPC,
                <p> quarto, VSCode
            </td>
            <td>
                <p> torch, JAX, pyg,
                <p> mpi4py, pybind11,
                <p> conda/mamba, poetry
            </td>
            <td>
                <p> LLMs, RL, NTK,
                <p> FL, DP, SMC,
                <p> GNNs, Domain Aware ML
            </td>
            <td>
                <p> Go, Rust, Fortran,
                <p> Graph DBs, SQL,
                <p> Qiskit, AWS, S3
                <p> dev-containers
            </td>
        </tr>
    </tbody>
</table>
```

:::

::: {.content-visible when-profile="python"}

```{=html}
<table>
    <thead>
        <tr>
            <th font-weight="bold">Python</th>
            <th font-weight="bold">Machine Learning</th>
            <th font-weight="bold">DevOps</th>
            <th font-weight="bold">C / C++17</th>
            <th font-weight="bold">Other</th>
        </tr>
    </thead>
    <tbody>
        <tr>
            <td>
                <p> torch, JAX, pyg,
                <p> mpi4py, pybind11,
                <p> conda/mamba, poetry
            </td>
            <td>
                <p> LLMs, RL, NTK,
                <p> FL, DP, SMC,
                <p> GNNs, Domain Aware ML
            </td>
            <td>
                <p> GitHub/GitLab, vim/tmux,
                <p> SLURM/LSF, HPC,
                <p> quarto, VSCode
            </td>
            <td>
                <p> CUDA, HIP,
                <p> CPU/GPU Profiling,
                <p> MPI, OpenMP,
                <p> CMake, Spack
            </td>
            <td>
                <p> Go, Rust, Fortran,
                <p> Graph DBs, SQL,
                <p> Qiskit, AWS, S3
                <p> dev-containers
            </td>
        </tr>
    </tbody>
</table>
```

:::


::: {.content-visible when-profile="devops"}

```{=html}
<table>
    <thead>
        <tr>
            <th font-weight="bold">DevOps</th>
            <th font-weight="bold">C / C++17</th>
            <th font-weight="bold">Python</th>
            <th font-weight="bold">Machine Learning</th>
            <th font-weight="bold">Other</th>
        </tr>
    </thead>
    <tbody>
        <tr>
            <td>
                <p> GitHub/GitLab, vim/tmux,
                <p> SLURM/LSF, HPC,
                <p> quarto, VSCode
            </td>
            <td>
                <p> CUDA, HIP,
                <p> CPU/GPU Profiling,
                <p> MPI, OpenMP,
                <p> CMake, Spack
            </td>
            <td>
                <p> torch, JAX, pyg,
                <p> mpi4py, pybind11,
                <p> conda/mamba, poetry
            </td>
            <td>
                <p> LLMs, RL, NTK,
                <p> FL, DP, SMC,
                <p> GNNs, Domain Aware ML
            </td>
            <td>
                <p> Go, Rust, Fortran,
                <p> Graph DBs, SQL,
                <p> Qiskit, AWS, S3
                <p> dev-containers
            </td>
        </tr>
    </tbody>
</table>
```

:::

::: {.content-visible when-profile="hrt"}

```{=html}
<table>
    <thead>
        <tr>
            <th font-weight="bold">Linux / Systems</th>
            <th font-weight="bold">HPC / Networking</th>
            <th font-weight="bold">GPU / Performance</th>
            <th font-weight="bold">Automation</th>
            <th font-weight="bold">Other</th>
        </tr>
    </thead>
    <tbody>
        <tr>
            <td>
                <p> Ubuntu/Debian, RHEL
                <p> systemd, cgroups
                <p> AMI builds, PXE
            </td>
            <td>
                <p> MPI, EFA, InfiniBand
                <p> PBS, SLURM, Lustre
                <p> NFS, FSx, S3
            </td>
            <td>
                <p> CUDA, HIP, RAJA
                <p> CPU/GPU Profiling
                <p> NVIDIA, AMD MI250X
            </td>
            <td>
                <p> Bash, Python, Go
                <p> Git[Hub/Lab] CI/CD
                <p> Spack, CMake, CDK
            </td>
            <td>
                <p> AWS (EC2/IAM/CDK)
                <p> vim/tmux, SSH
                <p> Containers, Ansible
            </td>
        </tr>
    </tbody>
</table>
```

:::

::: {.content-visible when-profile="onepager"}

```{=html}
<table>
    <thead>
        <tr>
            <th font-weight="bold">DevOps</th>
            <th font-weight="bold">C / C++17</th>
            <th font-weight="bold">Python</th>
            <th font-weight="bold">Machine Learning</th>
            <th font-weight="bold">Other</th>
        </tr>
    </thead>
    <tbody>
        <tr>
            <td>
                <p> HPC, SLURM, k8s
                <p> Git[Hub/Lab] CI/CD
                <p> Containers, AWS
            </td>
            <td>
                <p> CUDA/HIP C++/MPI
                <p> CPU/GPU Profiling
                <p> CMake, Spack
            </td>
            <td>
                <p> torch, tflow, JAX
                <p> mpi4py, pybind11
                <p> dist. workflows
            </td>
            <td>
                <p> LLMs, RL, NTK
                <p> FL/FHE, DP, SMC
                <p> GNNs, PINNs
            </td>
            <td>
                <p> Go, Rust, Fortran
                <p> Graph DBs, SQL
                <p> Qiskit, Azure
            </td>
        </tr>
    </tbody>
</table>
```

:::
